body:
This PR adds a broken test to reproduce https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCore.jl/issues/2019.

Authored by @juliasloan25 and co-authored by @charleskawczynski.
title: Add multiple field solve reproducer

body: I forgot to update the news on the last release, thanks for catching this @Julians42!
title: Update the news
Fix typo for printing error message

body:
It turns out that #2016 effectively does fix the issue for the land, but doesn't fix the multiple field solve reproducer because #2016 results in dispatch to the `single_field_solve!` method (not the internal `_single_field_solve!` method for the gpu). So, this PR adjusts the reproducer to be more faithful to where dispatch sends flow control.

The missing implementation, which is caught in this case in `src/` is:

```julia
function single_field_solve_diag_matrix_row!(
    cache,
    x,
    A::ColumnwiseBandMatrixField,
    b,
)
    Aⱼs = unzip_tuple_field_values(Fields.field_values(A.entries))
    b_vals = Fields.field_values(b)
    x_vals = Fields.field_values(x)
    (A₀,) = Aⱼs
    @. x_vals = inv(A₀) ⊠ b_vals
end
single_field_solve!(_, x, A::UniformScaling, b) = x .= inv(A.λ) .* b
function single_field_solve!(cache, x, A::ColumnwiseBandMatrixField, b)
    if eltype(A) <: MatrixFields.DiagonalMatrixRow
        single_field_solve_diag_matrix_row!(cache, x, A, b)
    else
        single_field_solve!(ClimaComms.device(axes(A)), cache, x, A, b)
    end
end
```
And based on this, we may want to keep dispatch how it was, since `@. x_vals = inv(A₀) ⊠ b_vals` is just as parallelizeable as the UniformScaling case. So we can update that logic accordingly.
title: Fix multiple field solve reproducer

body:
This commit adds some information that was lost in saving to a checkpoint: the `deep` option. It also adds tests for types too, making the tests more stringent.

This also fixes an issue with `rcompare` for different types of FieldVectors.

Closes #2022
title: Add information about deep grid in restart files
